abstract_summary: We argue that long-term agent memory is a third data model—distinct from relational databases and vector stores—with native write semantics (experience: encode, separate, consolidate, provenance) and read semantics (activate: cue-driven hybrid retrieval over a memory graph). We present FluctlightDB, an embedded open...
citation: FluctlightDB: A Memory Model of Data for AI Agents. Ganesh S. 2026-06-27. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20949889
